brief_notes: Thorough narrative treatment of the same study but tables are substantially less informative. Model comparison table uses 'Winner' labels instead of WAIC values. Medical values table provides the same incremental values. Cross-domain ambiguity table lacks slope coefficients and HDPi bounds. The introduction is unusually long and detailed relative to the results section. The methods section is well-written with clear model equations. Overall the paper is more discussion-heavy than data-presentation-heavy.
